Recommendations.Description: Strategy 'ArcherMonkSpend' is dominant with 93% aggregate win rate.
Evidence: Wins 93% of all matchups against other strategies.
Recommendations.Rationale: A healthy metagame requires that no single strategy dominates all others. Examine which units this strategy relies on and consider increasing their cost or reducing their stats.

Recommendations.Description: Strategy 'AllSpend' has no counter — beats 14 strategies, loses to none.
Evidence: Beats: ArcherDual, ArcherRush, ArcherTurtle, LancerDual, LancerRush, LancerTurtle, MixedDual, MixedRush, MixedTurtle, PawnGather, PawnIdle, WarriorDual, WarriorRush, WarriorTurtle

Recommendations.Rationale: Every strategy should have at least one viable counter for healthy metagame diversity.

Recommendations.Description: MONK is never produced by any agent in the evaluation.
Evidence: Zero production across all matches in the balance matrix.
Recommendations.Rationale: Reducing MONK cost by 15% may make it more attractive relative to alternatives.
Recommendations.FollowUpTest: Re-run matrix after cost adjustment and verify MONK appears in at least one winning strategy.
